text: Standing here, I sense the tension between sterile efficiency and human ingenuity. The glass walls, the fire extinguisher—potential, preparedness. Stepping over to the second space, vibrant colors and swirling text burst forth. R+D, research and development: here, ideas incubate, machines and minds intersect. I feel an undercurrent of curiosity, tinged with anticipation, as if knowledge and creation are simultaneously imminent and elusive.
